reforms.description: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007, reducing the number of municipalities from 271 to 98 and replacing the 14 counties by 5 regions, aimed at improving public sector efficiency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance public sector efficiency, which can lead to better allocation of resources and improved service delivery.
reforms.status_evidence: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of local governance structures, which is expected to have lasting impacts on public administration efficiency and service delivery.
reforms.source_quote: A major structural reform will come into force from January 2007 reducing the number of municipalities from 271 to 98 and replacing the 14 counties by 5 regions.

reforms.description: The Danish government proposed that public R&D funding should reach 1% of GDP by 2010, with half of all public research funding allocated on a competitive basis. This shift towards project-based public research funding allows private firms to bid for funds on equal terms, emphasizing quality assessments in grant allocation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public R&D funding and competitive allocation is expected to enhance research capabilities and stimulate innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice as of 2010.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in public R&D funding policy.
reforms.source_quote: The government’s globalisation strategy implies a shift to more contestable research funding and more weight on quality assessments when allocating research grants.

reforms.description: Taxation rules for pension funds have been revised to encourage their participation in the venture capital market, including a temporary 5% tax relief for investments via SME market places.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging pension funds to invest in venture capital is expected to enhance funding for innovative startups.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant as it modifies tax rules to stimulate investment in innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Taxation of pension funds has been simplified from January 2006.

reforms.description: Bankruptcy rules have been eased to allow greater opportunities for informal corporate rescue plans, facilitating smoother transitions for struggling businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Easing bankruptcy rules can help preserve viable businesses and promote innovation by allowing them to recover.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been successfully implemented since 2005.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is an adjustment to existing rules rather than a major overhaul.

reforms.description: The Danish government has launched several measures to improve integration and reduce ghetto problems, including renovating and modernising buildings in the social housing sector and earmarking funds for social initiatives.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact on economic growth is ambiguous as it focuses on social issues rather than direct innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been enacted and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform addresses significant social challenges but does not directly relate to innovation policy.
reforms.source_quote: The government has recently launched several measures to cope with integration and ghetto problems.

reforms.description: The Danish government proposed adjustments to public study grants to encourage early entry and on-schedule completion of tertiary education, including cutting monthly grants for late starters and offering bonuses for academic progress.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging timely completion of tertiary education is expected to enhance the supply of skilled researchers and innovators.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposal has been made but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting educational outcomes but is not a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: To create such incentives, the government has proposed a set of adjustments of the public study grants as part of the welfare reform currently being discussed.

reforms.description: Publicly funded business incubators will face stronger quality requirements, and firms undertaking substantial research will be allowed to compete for public research grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening quality requirements for incubators is expected to enhance support for innovative startups.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in improving the support structure for startups but is not a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Publicly funded business incubators should face stronger quality requirements.
